title: The Phantom of Paris
writer: Gaston Leroux, Edwin Justus Mayer, John Meehan
actors: John Gilbert, Leila Hyams, Lewis Stone
plot: Cheri-Bibi is an escape artist wrongly imprisoned for murdering the wealthy father of his admirer Cecile. The real murderer is Cecile's fiancé, so how will Bibi escape his death sentence and win back Cecile?
